nasb.text: But to the wicked God says, “What right have you to tell of My statutes And to take My covenant in your mouth?

esv.text: But to the wicked God says: “What right have you to recite my statutes or take my covenant on your lips?

cnv.text: 但　神對惡人說： “你怎麼敢述說我的律例， 你的口怎麼敢提到我的約呢？

ccb.text: 但上帝对恶人说： “你怎能背诵我的律法， 谈论我的约？

csbs.text: 但神对恶人说： “你凭什么讲述我的律例， 口中提起我的约呢？
